underlying_goal: Run a Gas Town patrol routine: execute heartbeat, check for hooks, and if none exist, create and execute a patrol wisp
friction_detail: Dolt database was corrupted and Claude spent the entire session trying to fix infrastructure issues (reinitializing databases, killing conflicting processes) without ever completing the actual patrol task.
brief_summary: User asked Deacon to run a Gas Town patrol routine but the session was consumed by Dolt database corruption and process conflicts, ultimately interrupted by the user before completion.
